title: Senior Financial Analyst - KPMG India International Enterprises - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - KPMG India International Enterprises - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, KPMG India International Enterprises in Srinagar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About KPMG India International Enterprises:
KPMG India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPMG India International Enterprises!
